violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee trained in food safety with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by single-service items in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Single-service items were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the deli, seafood, or bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The wall in the deli walk-in cooler was observed missing FRP paneling and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The floor tiles in the deli area were observed to be cracked and or missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in coolers ceilings, fan guards and foam insulation for refrigerant piping, and seafood ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. If equipment cannot be sanitized then equipment shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The grout in the meat room area and the caulking for the 3-bay sink in the produce area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The wall in the deli walk-in cooler was observed missing FRP paneling and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
